scripts.dev: concurrently --names backend,portal --prefix-colors blue,green "cd backend && air" "pnpm --filter mrsmith-portal dev"
scripts.build: pnpm -r --if-present build && cd backend && go build -o bin/server ./cmd/server
scripts.test: cd backend && go test ./... && pnpm -r --if-present test
scripts.lint: cd backend && golangci-lint run && pnpm -r --if-present lint
